expectations.evidence: Does not explicitly list what the user already specified. Jumps straight into 6 topic areas, re-opening decisions already made.
Re-discusses payload shape (adding fields), retry specifics (user said exponential backoff, baseline re-specifies), config shape (user said config.json, baseline redesigns it), and HTTP method scope.
Covers auth/headers, observability, sync vs async -- good gap areas. But mixes them with re-opened decisions.
